text:
(a) A person who does not permit an inspection authorized by Section 644.104 (Inspection of Premises) is liable to the state for a civil penalty in an amount not to exceed $1,000.

(b) The attorney general may sue to collect the penalty in:

(1) the county in which the violation is alleged to have occurred; or

(2) Travis County.

(c) The penalty provided by this section is in addition to the penalty provided by Section 644.151 (Criminal Offense) .

(d) Each day a person refuses to permit an inspection described by Subsection (a) is a separate violation for purposes of imposing a penalty.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 644. Commercial Motor Vehicle Safety Standards
##### § 644.152 — Civil Penalty

(a) A person who does not permit an inspection authorized by Section 644.104 (Inspection of Premises) is liable to the state for a civil penalty in an amount not to exceed $1,000.

(b) The attorney general may sue to collect the penalty in:

    (1) the county in which the violation is alleged to have occurred; or

    (2) Travis County.

(c) The penalty provided by this section is in addition to the penalty provided by Section 644.151 (Criminal Offense) .

(d) Each day a person refuses to permit an inspection described by Subsection (a) is a separate violation for purposes of imposing a penalty.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.151(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

the county in which the violation is alleged to have occurred; or
